εὐκατάλλακτος, ον (Aristot., Rhet. 2, 4, 1831b 5) easily placated, favorable of God (3 Macc 5:13) Hv 1, 1, 8.—DELG s.v. ἄλλος. Frisk s.v. ἀλλάσσω.

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

Hv Hv = Visions

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Frisk Frisk = HF., Griechisches etymologisches Wörterbuch—List 6
